title: JPEG Image
documentation:
## Purpose
Represents a JPEG-encoded raster image. JPEG is a lossy compression format optimised for photographic content, achieving small file sizes at the cost of some image quality.

## When to use
Use `media:jpeg;image` when a node produces or consumes JPEG images — for example photographs, camera captures, or compressed image exports. For images requiring lossless quality or transparency, prefer [PNG Image](https://capdag.com/browse/media:png) or [WebP Image](https://capdag.com/browse/media:webp;image).

## Notes
JPEG does not support transparency. Repeated re-compression degrades quality; nodes that modify JPEG images should work with a lossless intermediate where possible and re-encode only once at the final output step.
